subcodes.title: Words to Mr and Mrs Kinney et al, spoken on 1909-08-22
subcodes.first_line: You must be a source of happiness to whomsoever you meet. The world is like the body and the love of God is like the spirit
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @love and unity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
